'''R5-L4''', also called '''Elfour''', was an [[R5-series astromech droid]] who frequently served on [[Kyp Durron]]'s [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] during his time in the [[Kyp's Dozen|Dozen-and-Two Avengers]].<ref name="VP">''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''</ref>

==Biography==
{{Quote|Elfour's gone.|Kyp Durron to Han Solo following the rout at Helska IV|<ref name="VP" />}}
During the Dozen-and-Two's investigation above [[Helska IV]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], all [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] but Kyp and [[Miko Reglia]], who escaped to the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] surface, were [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], and R5-L4 was destroyed by a [[grutchin]].

Durron was incredibly saddened by the loss of the droid, whom he had come to appreciate as a true friend.<ref name="VP" />

{{Droid-stub}}
